name: browser.cpp
description: In-browser C++20 IDE powered by Monaco Editor and WASM Clang

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; worker-src 'self' blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; img-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self' https://github.com https://objects.githubusercontent.com https://github-releases.githubusercontent.com
